candidate_lesson: When the 30-indicator consensus shows directional agreement but green_matches=0 and hist_hr=0%, treat the signal as unvalidated and freeze new entries on that pair regardless of conviction score.
testable_rule: if consensus_dir != 'NEUTRAL' and green_matches == 0 and hist_hr == 0.0: return ConsensusVeto()  # require green_matches >= 1 before sizing on 30-indicator direction
reason: Rule filters only 0 trades — insufficient sample
